description: SDP arm (paper §6.1, LOCKED 2026-06-29): Spark Declarative Pipelines + framework structural dry-run gate + `pyspark-sdp` API skill. NO safety skill (spark-safety SCRAPPED everywhere -- it moved silent-defect by 0.000 and was the biggest reviewer confound). The dry-run gate is INTRINSIC to the declarative paradigm (framing F1): every proposal is screened by the framework dry-run before execute. Headline contrast is A (bare imperative) vs B.
